info.title: JD.AI.Daemon
info.description: All-in-one system service for JD.AI — REST API, SignalR, Blazor dashboard, agent pool, and auto-updates as a Windows Service or systemd unit.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: JD.AI Gateway Daemon — run as a system service with auto-updates

commands.name: run
commands.description: Start the daemon (default when no subcommand is given)

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install as a Windows Service or systemd unit

options.name: --elevated
options.description: Internal flag used after UAC/sudo relaunch. [default: False]

options.name: --elevated
options.description: Internal flag used after UAC/sudo relaunch. [default: False]

options.name: --elevated
options.description: Internal flag used after UAC/sudo relaunch. [default: False]

options.name: --elevated
options.description: Internal flag used after UAC/sudo relaunch. [default: False]

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show service status, version, and uptime

commands.name: update
commands.description: Check for and apply updates from NuGet

options.name: --check-only
options.description: Only check — don't apply the update [default: False]

options.name: --all
options.description: Update all installed JD.AI tools (default) [default: False]

options.name: --daemon-only
options.description: Update only the daemon tool [default: False]

options.name: --elevated
options.description: Internal flag used after UAC/sudo relaunch. [default: False]

options.name: --lines
options.description: Number of log lines to show [default: 50]

commands.name: bridge
commands.description: Manage OpenClaw bridge mode and enablement (status|enable|disable|passthrough)

options.name: --elevated
options.description: Internal flag used after UAC/sudo relaunch. [default: False]

commands.name: dashboard
commands.description: Open the dashboard in the default browser
